---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new simulation, adapter, or panel capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What network behaviour are you trying to test that the package can't simulate
today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to be able to do, ideally with a sketch of the API.

```dart
// e.g. controller.setSomething(...);
```

## Alternatives considered

Anything you tried or ruled out.

## Additional context

Links, references, or real-world behaviour you're modelling.
